name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
description: AI agents v10: centralized hooks (all validation in hooks.json for plugin compatibility), Supervisor validation hook, Code Reviewer disallowedTools enforcement, effort tuning (Red Team/QA Strategist: high), Supervisor maxTurns guard, WorktreeCreate/StopFailure logging hooks, Supervisor v3→v4 reference fixes. 11 agent roles: Launch Pad, Supervisor v4, Execute Manager, Context-Keeper, Worker, Product Owner, Orchestrator, Code Reviewer (LSP, effort:high, disallowedTools:Write/Edit/NotebookEdit, schema v2), Red Team Reviewer (effort:high), QA Strategist (effort:high), QA Executor. 46 reusable skills. 9 quality gate hooks, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
